Ring gives free 50% damage boost +2 base power and +2 coin power

content: Yall, I am scared for my sanity

What are Lunar reactions? Whats Hexerei?
There has to be like a catchup video or something you can watch to get caught in the loop
Wishing y'll a great day or night

Real and true and real again
They cooked so hard in this design
Hopefully, Im so scared what if I pull someone trash
